title: ocimum fischeri
intro: Ocimum fischeri, also known as Fischer's basil, is a perennial plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant properties. Ocimum fischeri can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its essential oil can also be extracted for use in aromatherapy and skincare applications.
